creator: trombik1973@gmail.com
text: cura is just a front-end, and heavily depends on its dependencies. without updating depended libraries, new version will not provide what the release note says. this is especially true in this PR, as the reporter needs fixes in cura engine, the slicer. I'm sure that new package will not even launch as cura needs new run-time library that I mentioned previously. please have a close look at my repository, and test the application before committing.
